_comment: Scenario-staged ROLL_THE_LINE demo: a full-strength (120) player Infantry unit is ordered under the roll-the-line stance to attack a lone weak (15-man, low-morale) enemy at the front of a line of three. As each enemy in turn breaks and routs, the attacker automatically rolls onto the next-closest enemy still fighting -- no fresh order issued for the second or third target. Camera holds on the line so the sequential engagement reads clearly.
